title: Sobolev regularity of the symmetric gradient of solutions to a class of $φ$-Laplacian systems

AI.tldr: 证明了具有非线性增长算子的椭圆系统弱解的二阶正则性，建立了对称梯度函数的Sobolev正则性。
AI.motivation: 研究具有非线性增长条件和x-变量Lipschitz连续性的椭圆系统弱解的二阶正则性，这类问题在非线性弹性理论、非牛顿流体力学等领域有重要应用。
AI.techniques: 通过构造具有奇异高阶扰动的逼近问题，建立一致的高阶可微性估计；使用Orlicz-Sobolev空间理论处理非线性增长条件；利用Young函数描述算子的增长行为。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当外力项f属于适当的Orlicz-Sobolev空间时，对称梯度函数具有Sobolev正则性；建立了逼近问题解的一致高阶可微性估计。
AI.significance: 扩展了非线性椭圆系统正则性理论，为具有非标准增长条件的偏微分方程提供了新的正则性结果，在非线性连续介质力学中有重要应用价值。

title: Besov space approach to the Navier-Stokes equations with the Neumann boundary condition in bounded domains
summary: Based on the analysis by Iwabuchi-Matsuyama-Taniguchi (2019), we first introduce our framework of Besov spaces $\dot B^s_{p, q}$ on the bounded domain $Ω\subset {\mathbb R}^d$ with smooth boundary $\partial Ω$ in terms of the Stokes operator $A=A_2$ with the Neumann boundary condition on $\partialΩ$ in $L^2_σ(Ω)$. Under some geometric assumption on $Ω$, we establish $L^p-L^q$ type estimates of the semi-group $\{e^{-tA}\}_{t \ge 0}$ in $\dot B^s_{p, q}$ and prove a local well-posedness of the Navier-Stokes equations with the initial data in $\dot B^{-1+\frac dp }_{p, q}$ for $d < p < \infty$ and $1 \le q \le \infty$. Since $d < p$, we have $L^{d, \infty} \subset \dot B^{-1+\frac dp }_{p, \infty}$ so that our space for well-posedness is larger than any other previous one in bounded domains.

AI.tldr: 在有界光滑边界区域上建立了基于Stokes算子的Besov空间框架，并在该框架下证明了Navier-Stokes方程的局部适定性，其初始数据空间比以往结果更大。
AI.motivation: 在有界区域上研究Navier-Stokes方程的适定性问题，特别是寻找比传统Lorentz空间L^{d,∞}更大的初始数据空间。Iwabuchi-Matsuyama-Taniguchi (2019)的分析为建立基于Stokes算子的Besov空间框架提供了基础。
AI.techniques: 使用Stokes算子A（带Neumann边界条件）在有界区域上定义Besov空间；建立半群{e^{-tA}}在Besov空间中的L^p-L^q型估计；利用这些估计证明Navier-Stokes方程的局部适定性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在有界光滑边界区域上建立了基于Stokes算子的Besov空间框架；2. 证明了半群{e^{-tA}}在Besov空间中的L^p-L^q型估计；3. 证明了Navier-Stokes方程在空间B^{-1+d/p}_{p,q}中的局部适定性，其中d<p<∞, 1≤q≤∞。
AI.significance: 该工作扩展了有界区域上Navier-Stokes方程的适定性理论，由于L^{d,∞}⊂B^{-1+d/p}_{p,∞}（当d<p时），所得初始数据空间比以往所有结果都大，为研究更大类别的初始数据提供了理论框架。

title: On the defocusing stationary nonlinear Schrödinger equation on metric graphs
summary: We study the defocusing nonlinear Schrödinger equation on noncompact metric graphs under general self-adjoint vertex conditions ensuring the existence of a negative eigenvalue of the Hamiltonian operator. First, we focus on the existence of energy ground states with prescribed mass. We show that existence and stability always hold for small masses and fail for large masses in the $L^2$-subcritical regime. For $δ$-type vertex conditions, we provide more precise results: ground states exist for all masses in the $L^2$-critical and supercritical cases, while in the subcritical case, for one vertex graphs, there exists a sharp mass threshold such that ground states exist below it and do not exist above it. Moreover, we show that the ground state bifurcates from the vanishing solution at the bottom of the Hamiltonian spectrum. Finally, we present multiplicity results for stationary solutions, both in the fixed-frequency and fixed-mass settings.

AI.tldr: 研究了非紧度量图上具有负特征值的自伴顶点条件下散焦非线性薛定谔方程基态解的存在性、稳定性和多解性
AI.motivation: 研究非紧度量图上非线性薛定谔方程在自伴顶点条件下基态解的存在性问题，特别关注哈密顿算子具有负特征值的情况，探索质量约束下能量泛函极小化解的性质
AI.techniques: 变分方法、集中紧性原理、谱分析、分歧理论、L^2临界性分析、δ型顶点条件特殊处理
AI.main_theorems: 1. 小质量下基态存在且稳定，大质量下在L^2次临界情形失效；2. δ型顶点条件下，L^2临界和超临界情形对所有质量基态存在，次临界情形存在尖锐质量阈值；3. 基态从哈密顿谱底部解分歧；4. 固定频率和固定质量框架下的多解性结果
AI.significance: 扩展了度量图上非线性薛定谔方程基态理论，揭示了负特征值对解结构的影响，为量子图上的波动力学提供了新的数学基础

title: Ground States of Attractive Fermi Schrödinger Systems with Ring-Shaped Potentials
summary: As an application of the finite-rank Lieb-Thirring inequality established in [R. L. Frank, D. Gontier and M. Lewin, Comm. Math. Phys., 2021], we study ground states of mass-critical N-coupled Fermi nonlinear Schrödinger systems with attractive interactions in $\mathbb{R}^3$, which are trapped in ring-shaped potentials. For any given $N\in\mathbb{N}^+$, we prove that ground states exist if $0<a<a_N^*$, where $a$ denotes the strength of attractive interactions in the system, and $a_N^*$ is the best constant of a finite-rank Lieb-Thirring inequality. Moreover, for some $N\in\mathbb{N}^+$, we also prove the nonexistence of minimizers for the system as soon as $a\geq a_N^*$. Applying the energy estimates and the blow-up analysis, we further analyze the mass concentration behavior of ground states for the system as $a\nearrow a_N^*$.

AI.tldr: 证明了在环形势阱中质量临界N耦合费米非线性薛定谔系统基态的存在性、不存在性及其质量集中行为
AI.motivation: 研究三维空间中具有吸引相互作用的N耦合费米非线性薛定谔系统的基态问题，该系统具有质量临界性和环形势阱约束
AI.techniques: 有限秩Lieb-Thirring不等式、能量估计、爆破分析、变分方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对任意N，当吸引强度0<a<a_N^*时基态存在；2. 对某些N，当a≥a_N^*时极小元不存在；3. 当a↗a_N^*时基态的质量集中行为分析
AI.significance: 将有限秩Lieb-Thirring不等式应用于多分量费米系统，揭示了质量临界系统中吸引相互作用强度阈值对基态存在性的影响

title: Sobolev mappings of Euclidean space and product structure
summary: We consider bounded open connected sets $Ω_1, Ω_2 \subset \mathbb{R}^n$ and Sobolev maps $f: Ω_1 \times Ω_2 \subset \mathbb{R}^n \times \mathbb{R}^n$, such that for almost every $x \in Ω_1 \times Ω_2$ the weak differential $\nabla f(x)$ is invertible and preserves or swaps the spaces $\mathbb{R}^n \times \{0\}$ and $\{0\} \times \mathbb{R}^n$. We show that if $n \ge 2$ and $f \in W^{1,2}$ then $f$ is split, i.e., $f(x_1, x_2) = (f_1(x_1), f_2(x_2))$ or $f(x_1, x_2) = (f_2(x_2), f_1(x_1))$. We also show that this conclusion fails in general for $n=1$, even if we assume in addition that $f$ is bi-Lipschitz and area preserving. These results complement our previous work https://arxiv.org/abs/2403.20265, where we showed that the conclusion fails for $n \ge 2$ if the Sobolev space $W^{1,2}$ is replaced by $W^{1,p}$ for any $p < 2$. We also discuss results for approximately split maps, i.e. for sequences of maps $f_k$ such that $\nabla f_k$ approaches the set of linear invertible split maps in suitable $L^p$ spaces. This work is partly motivated by the question whether Sobolev maps defined on products of Carnot groups are split.

AI.tldr: 证明了在Sobolev空间W^{1,2}中，保持或交换乘积空间结构的可逆微分映射必须是分裂映射
AI.motivation: 研究定义在乘积空间上的Sobolev映射的结构问题，特别是当映射的微分保持或交换乘积空间结构时，是否必然具有分裂形式。这源于更广泛的问题：定义在Carnot群乘积上的Sobolev映射是否总是分裂的。
AI.techniques: 使用Sobolev空间理论、弱微分分析、乘积空间结构保持性质的分析方法，以及反例构造技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当n≥2且f∈W^{1,2}时，保持或交换乘积空间结构的可逆微分映射必须是分裂映射；2. n=1时结论不成立，即使附加双Lipschitz和保面积条件；3. 对近似分裂映射序列的收敛性结果
AI.significance: 揭示了Sobolev映射在乘积空间上的结构刚性，为Carnot群乘积上的映射分析提供了理论基础，并确定了Sobolev指数p=2是保证分裂性的临界值

title: The Planar Coleman--Gurtin model with Beltrami conductivity
summary:
This article addresses the planar Coleman--Gurtin heat equation with memory on a bounded domain, with rough anisotropic diffusion $A_μ$, typical of heterogeneous or composite media and encoded by a Beltrami coefficient $μ\in L^\infty(Ω)$ satisfying $\|μ\|_{\infty}<1$.
  First, under no additional smoothness assumptions on $μ$, solutions with $H^1_0(Ω)$-based initial data enter a time-averaged $L^\infty(Ω)$ regime, and instantaneously regularize into the second-order graph space $D(A_μ)$.
  Assuming in addition $μ\in W^{1,2}(Ω)$, this regularization upgrades to $W^{2,p}(Ω)$ for every $1<p<2$, and we construct regular global and exponential attractors of finite fractal dimension, for both the $L^2(Ω)$ and $H^1_0(Ω)$-based dynamics. The proof combines the instantaneous smoothing method of Chekroun, Di Plinio, Glatt-Holtz and Pata with maximal parabolic regularity for divergence-form operators with measurable coefficients, and with planar quasiconformal Beltrami estimates recently obtained in work by Green, Wick and the author.

AI.tldr: 研究了具有记忆项的平面Coleman-Gurtin热方程在粗糙各向异性扩散下的正则化行为和吸引子存在性
AI.motivation: 研究具有记忆项的Coleman-Gurtin热方程在粗糙各向异性扩散系数下的动力学行为，这种扩散系数出现在异质或复合材料中，由Beltrami系数μ∈L^∞(Ω)描述，满足‖μ‖∞<1
AI.techniques: 结合Chekroun等人的瞬时光滑化方法、具有可测系数的散度形式算子的极大抛物正则性理论，以及作者与合作者最近获得的平面拟共形Beltrami估计
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在μ无额外光滑性假设下，基于H¹₀(Ω)初值的解进入时间平均L^∞(Ω)区域，并瞬时正则化到二阶图空间D(A_μ)；2. 若μ∈W^{1,2}(Ω)，正则化提升到W^{2,p}(Ω)对所有1<p<2成立，并构造了有限分形维数的正则全局和指数吸引子
AI.significance: 为具有记忆项的热方程在粗糙各向异性介质中的动力学行为提供了严格分析框架，建立了正则化机制和吸引子存在性，对复合材料中的热传导问题有重要理论意义

title: Qualitative properties of the fractional magnetic $p$-Laplacian and applications to critical quasilinear problems
summary: We investigate the fractional magnetic $p$-Laplacian operator in the physical dimension case $N=3$, with $0<s<1<p$ and $sp<3$. Our goal is twofold. First, we define and study suitable functional settings for such operator proving significant properties. Then we get the existence of weak solutions for some quasilinear equations involving a weighted critical and subcritical power type nonlinearity. Our technique relies on variational methods and faces various difficulties: the complex quasilinear framework due to the presence of an external magnetic potential, the nonlocal setting, which entails appropriate tools, and the lack of compactness, which requires concentration compactness arguments. In this direction, we state a new concentration compactness principle in the quasilinear magnetic setting that seems to be missing in the literature.

AI.tldr: 在三维空间中研究分数阶磁p-Laplacian算子，建立了新的泛函框架并证明了带临界和次临界非线性项的拟线性方程弱解的存在性。
AI.motivation: 研究三维空间(N=3)中的分数阶磁p-Laplacian算子，其中0<s<1<p且sp<3。该算子结合了分数阶导数、非线性p-Laplacian结构和外部磁势，在量子力学和凝聚态物理中有重要应用。主要动机是建立合适的泛函框架并解决相关的拟线性方程。
AI.techniques: 变分方法、集中紧性原理、分数阶Sobolev空间理论、磁势下的泛函分析。特别地，作者在拟线性磁势框架下建立了一个新的集中紧性原理，这是文献中缺失的重要工具。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了分数阶磁p-Laplacian算子的合适泛函框架并证明了重要性质；2. 证明了带有加权临界和次临界幂型非线性的拟线性方程弱解的存在性；3. 提出了拟线性磁势框架下的新集中紧性原理。
AI.significance: 填补了分数阶磁p-Laplacian算子在三维空间研究的空白，为处理非局部、非线性、带磁势的拟线性问题提供了系统的理论框架。新建立的集中紧性原理是该领域的重要工具，对量子力学和凝聚态物理中的相关模型有重要应用价值。

title: A spectral approach to interface layers on networks for the linearized BGK equation and its acoustic limit
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2512.04634
summary: We consider in this paper a velocity discretized version of the full linear kinetic BGK model and the corresponding limit for small Knudsen number, the linearised Euler or acoustic system. Considering these equations on networks, coupling conditions for the macroscopic equations are derived from the kinetic conditions via an asymptotic analysis near the nodes of the network. Here, a degeneracy in the limit equations requires not only the investigation of kinetic layers, but also the discussion of viscous layers. Using the kinetic coupling conditions at the junction and coupling kinetic and viscous layers to the outer problems on the edges one obtains a coupled kinetic half-space problem at each node. A spectral method is developed to solve this coupled kinetic half-space problems. This allows to obtain a detailed picture of the various interface layers near the nodes and to determine the relevant coefficients in the kinetic derived coupling conditions for the macroscopic equations.Numerical results show the accuracy and efficiency of the approach.

AI.tldr: 通过渐近分析和谱方法，从离散速度线性BGK模型推导出网络节点处线性化欧拉方程的耦合条件
AI.motivation: 研究网络上的线性化BGK动力学模型及其在Knudsen数趋近于零时的极限行为，解决从微观动力学条件推导宏观方程在节点处的耦合条件这一核心问题
AI.techniques: 渐近分析、边界层理论（动力学层和粘性层）、谱方法求解耦合动力学半空间问题、微观-宏观匹配
AI.main_theorems: 建立了从离散速度线性BGK模型推导线性化欧拉方程在节点处耦合条件的系统方法，通过求解耦合动力学半空间问题确定了宏观耦合条件中的相关系数
AI.significance: 为网络上的多尺度输运问题提供了严格的数学基础，建立了微观动力学模型与宏观流体力学方程在复杂几何结构中的桥梁，具有理论和数值计算的双重意义

title: An anisotropic Serrin's problem in general domains
summary:
Serrin's symmetry theorem shows that the classical overdetermined torsion problem forces the domain to be a ball. Extending this rigidity statement to merely Lipschitz (and more generally rough) domains in the weak formulation has been a long-standing and challenging problem, recently resolved by the authors in [12].
  In this paper we address the corresponding question in the anisotropic setting: Given a uniformly convex $C^{2,γ}$ anisotropy $H$, we study the overdetermined problem for the anisotropic Laplacian $Δ_H u={\rm div}\big(H(\nabla u)\,DH(\nabla u)\big)$ on a bounded indecomposable set of finite perimeter $Ω$. Assuming the Ahlfors--David regularity of $\partial^*Ω$ and a global $β$-number square-function bound (a weak uniform rectifiability hypothesis), we prove that a weak solution exists if and only if $Ω$ is a translate and dilation of the Wulff shape, in which case the solution is unique and explicit. In particular, the result applies to Lipschitz domains.
  While our approach follows the rough-domain strategy of [12] at a high level, the key Laplacian-specific ingredients exploited there have no direct analog for $Δ_H$, necessitating the development of new ideas and techniques.

AI.tldr: 将Serrin对称性定理推广到各向异性Laplacian的弱解情形，证明在弱一致可整流性假设下，超定问题的解存在当且仅当区域是Wulff形状的平移和伸缩。
AI.motivation: Serrin对称性定理表明经典超定扭转问题强制区域为球。将该刚性结果推广到Lipschitz（及更粗糙）区域的弱解形式是一个长期挑战，作者近期在[12]中解决了各向同性情形。本文研究各向异性Laplacian的对应问题。
AI.techniques: 采用[12]的粗糙区域策略，但发展了新思想和技术：利用Ahlfors-David正则性、全局β-数平方函数界（弱一致可整流性假设）、各向异性Laplacian的特定分析工具，以及有限周长集合的几何测度论方法。
AI.main_theorems: 在一致凸C^{2,γ}各向异性H下，对于有界不可分解有限周长集合Ω，假设∂*Ω满足Ahlfors-David正则性和全局β-数平方函数界，则各向异性Laplacian超定问题的弱解存在当且仅当Ω是Wulff形状的平移和伸缩，此时解唯一且显式。
AI.significance: 首次将Serrin对称性定理推广到各向异性Laplacian的粗糙区域弱解情形，建立了各向异性超定问题的完全刚性结果，为各向异性偏微分方程几何理论提供了重要工具，特别适用于Lipschitz区域。

title: Asymptotically linear fractional problems with mixed boundary conditions
summary: We derive the existence of solutions for an asymptotically linear equation driven by the spectral fractional Laplacian operator with mixed Dirichlet-Neumann boundary conditions. When the nonlinear term $f$ is odd and a suitable relation between the perturbation parameter, the limit of $f(\cdot,t)/t$ as $t\to 0$ and the eigenvalues occurs, we establish also a multiplicity result via the pseudo-index theory related to the genus.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有混合Dirichlet-Neumann边界条件的谱分数阶Laplacian算子的渐近线性方程解的存在性和多重性
AI.motivation: 研究谱分数阶Laplacian算子在混合边界条件下的非线性椭圆问题，这类问题在物理和工程中有广泛应用，如反常扩散、相变等
AI.techniques: 使用伪指标理论（pseudo-index theory）与亏格（genus）相关的变分方法，结合渐近线性分析和谱理论
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在适当条件下证明解的存在性；2. 当非线性项f为奇函数且扰动参数、f在零点的极限与特征值满足特定关系时，通过伪指标理论建立多重解结果
AI.significance: 将经典椭圆问题的多重解理论推广到分数阶情形，为混合边界条件下的分数阶PDE提供了新的存在性分析方法

title: Ergodicity for a Constantin-Lax-Majda-DeGregorio model of turbulent flow
summary: This paper presents a mathematical analysis of a one-dimensional model of turbulence based on a stochastic generalized Constantin-Lax-Majda-DeGregorio (gCLMG) equation. We focus on the specific case where the nonlinearity in the equation allows the existence of the anomalous enstrophy cascade, which is an inviscid conserved quantity, and some effective energy estimates for mathematical analysis. The existence of an invariant measure in the attractor is proved via the classical Krylov-Bogoliubov argument. The uniqueness of the measure and exponential mixing are proved under a sufficiently large viscosity condition, in which the nonlocal structure of the nonlinear term plays a prominent role. The construction of this invariant measure is the first step towards a theoretical understanding of turbulent phenomena that cause anomalous cascades in the zero viscous limit, viewed from the dynamical systems theory.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有反常级串的一维湍流随机gCLMG方程的不变测度存在性、唯一性和指数混合性
AI.motivation: 研究反常级串湍流现象，从动力系统理论角度理解零粘性极限下的湍流行为，建立具有反常能量级串的一维湍流模型的数学理论
AI.techniques: 使用Krylov-Bogoliubov方法证明不变测度存在性，在足够大粘性条件下证明测度唯一性和指数混合性，利用非线性项的非局部结构进行分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了吸引子上不变测度的存在性，在足够大粘性条件下证明了不变测度的唯一性和系统的指数混合性
AI.significance: 首次从动力系统理论角度为反常级串湍流现象建立了数学基础，为零粘性极限下的湍流理论理解迈出了关键第一步

title: Subcritical bifurcations of shear flows
summary: It is well-known that shear flows in a strip or in the half plane are unstable for the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations if the viscosity $ν$ is small enough, provided the horizontal wave number $α$ lies in a small interval, between the so called lower and upper marginal stability curves. Moreover, a Hopf bifurcation occurs at the upper marginal stability curve. In this article, for various shear flows, we give numerical evidences that this bifurcation is subcritical.

AI.tldr: 通过数值证据证明Navier-Stokes方程中剪切流的Hopf分岔是亚临界的
AI.motivation: 研究不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程中剪切流的不稳定性问题，特别是当粘度ν足够小时，剪切流在水平波数α处于上下边际稳定性曲线之间时变得不稳定，且在上下边际稳定性曲线处发生Hopf分岔
AI.techniques: 数值模拟方法，稳定性分析，分岔理论，Navier-Stokes方程的数值求解
AI.main_theorems: 对于多种剪切流，提供了数值证据表明在上下边际稳定性曲线处发生的Hopf分岔是亚临界的（subcritical）
AI.significance: 揭示了剪切流不稳定性的分岔特性，对理解Navier-Stokes方程中流动失稳的机制有重要意义，亚临界分岔意味着系统在参数变化时可能出现突然的、非连续的状态转变

title: On Local Regularity of Distributional Solutions to the Navier--Stokes Equations
summary: We provide a sharp result that guarantees that a distributional solution satisfying the Prodi-Serrin condition is regular in the spatial variables. The solution does not need to belong to the (local) Leray-Hopf class.

AI.tldr: 证明了满足Prodi-Serrin条件的分布解在空间变量上具有正则性，且解无需属于局部Leray-Hopf类
AI.motivation: 研究Navier-Stokes方程的正则性准则，特别是Prodi-Serrin条件在分布解框架下的适用性，放宽了对解类的要求
AI.techniques: 分布解理论、Prodi-Serrin型正则性准则、能量估计、局部化技术，可能涉及Besov空间或弱解框架
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：若分布解满足Prodi-Serrin条件，则解在空间变量上正则；该结果不要求解属于局部Leray-Hopf类
AI.significance: 扩展了Navier-Stokes方程的正则性理论，为更广泛的解类提供了正则性判据，对理解流体方程奇点形成有重要意义

title: Dimension of the singular set in the parabolic obstacle problem
summary: In this paper we study the singular set in the parabolic obstacle problem for general obstacles $\varphi \in C^{2,1}$. We prove that the singular set has parabolic Hausdorff dimension at most $n-1$. Prior to our result, this was only known when $Δ\varphi \equiv -1$. Our approach combines a truncated parabolic frequency formula and monotonicity estimates with an iterative argument showing that the frequency is saturated for all values of the truncation parameter between $2$ and $3$.

AI.tldr: 证明了抛物障碍问题中奇异集的抛物Hausdorff维数最多为n-1，推广了之前仅适用于Δφ≡-1的结果。
AI.motivation: 研究抛物障碍问题中奇异集的结构，特别是其维数估计。之前的结果仅适用于特殊障碍函数Δφ≡-1，本文旨在将此结果推广到一般的C^{2,1}障碍函数。
AI.techniques: 结合截断抛物频率公式、单调性估计和迭代论证，证明频率在截断参数2到3之间达到饱和。
AI.main_theorems: 对于一般障碍函数φ∈C^{2,1}，抛物障碍问题的奇异集具有抛物Hausdorff维数最多为n-1。
AI.significance: 将奇异集维数估计从特殊情形推广到一般障碍函数，深化了对抛物障碍问题奇异结构的理解，为相关自由边界问题的研究提供了新工具。

title: Normalized solutions to mass supercritical Schrödinger equations with radial potentials
summary: We study the stationary nonlinear Schrödinger equation \begin{equation}-Δu+V(x)u+λu=|u|^{q-2}u,\quad u \in H^1(\mathbb{R}^N), \quad N \geq 2\end{equation} where $V \in L^{\infty}(\mathbb{R}^N)$ is a radial potential. In the $L^2$-supercritical regime, we show the existence of an explicit $μ_0 >0$ such that, for any $μ\in (0, μ_0)$, the equation admits two solutions having $L^2$ norm $μ$. The potential $V$ is not assumed to have a sign, nor a specific behavior at infinity and only a low regularity is required. Our proof relies on the use of Morse type information, on some spectral arguments, and on a blow-up analysis developed in a radial setting.

AI.tldr: 在L^2超临界区域中，对于径向势能V，证明了存在两个具有给定L^2范数μ的解
AI.motivation: 研究具有径向势能的非线性薛定谔方程的定态解存在性问题，特别关注L^2超临界区域中具有给定L^2范数的解的存在性，不要求势能有特定符号或无穷远处行为
AI.techniques: 使用Morse类型信息、谱分析方法和径向框架下的爆破分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 存在明确的μ_0>0，使得对于任意μ∈(0, μ_0)，方程存在两个具有L^2范数μ的解
AI.significance: 扩展了非线性薛定谔方程解的存在性理论，在更一般的势能条件下（无符号要求、无穷远处无特定行为）建立了多重解的存在性结果

title: Exponential stability of the linearized viscous Saint-Venant equations using a quadratic Lyapunov function
summary: In this work, we investigate the exponential stability of the viscous Saint-Venant equations by adding to the standard hyperbolic Saint-Venant equations a viscosity term coming from the higher order approximation of the Saint-Venant equations from Navier-Stokes equations. The inclusion of viscosity transforms these equations into more complex second-order partial differential equations, accurately modeling the behavior of real-world fluids that inherently possess viscosity. We construct an explicit quadratic Lyapunov function and demonstrate that it must be diagonal in physical coordinates, revealing that certain quadratic Lyapunov functions effective in non-viscous cases become inadequate when viscosity is introduced. We find explicit sufficient conditions on the parameters of the boundary conditions such that for small viscosities a quadratic Lyapunov function exists. This result ensures the exponential stability of the linearized system around the steady-state solutions in the $L^2$ norm.

AI.tldr: 建立了粘性圣维南方程在L²范数下的指数稳定性，通过构造显式二次Lyapunov函数并给出边界参数的充分条件。
AI.motivation: 研究粘性圣维南方程的稳定性问题，该方程通过在标准双曲型圣维南方程中加入来自Navier-Stokes方程高阶近似的粘性项，能更精确地模拟具有粘性的真实流体行为。
AI.techniques: 构造显式二次Lyapunov函数，分析其在物理坐标下的对角性质，推导边界参数的充分条件，使用线性化分析和L²范数稳定性理论。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于小粘性系数，存在二次Lyapunov函数的充分条件，从而保证了线性化系统在稳态解附近的L²指数稳定性。
AI.significance: 为粘性流体模型的稳定性分析提供了理论基础，揭示了粘性对Lyapunov函数构造的影响，对实际流体系统的控制和稳定性设计有重要指导意义。

title: Long-time behaviour of a nonlocal stochastic fractional reaction--diffusion equation arising in tumour dynamics
summary:
We introduce a stochastic nonlocal reaction--diffusion model arising in tumour dynamics. Spatial dispersal is described by the fractional Laplacian, accounting for anomalous diffusion and long--range relocation events. The system is perturbed by multiplicative fractional Brownian motion (fBm) with Hurst parameter $H>1/2$, which we interpret as temporally correlated fluctuations in the tumour microenvironment and host response.
  We first establish well--posedness and identify parameter regimes leading to global--in--time solutions or finite--time blow--up under general multiplicative fractional noise. We then focus on linear multiplicative noise and, via a Doss--Sussmann transformation, derive sharper results: explicit lower and upper bounds for the blow--up time together with quantitative estimates of the blow--up probability, clarifying how noise intensity can accelerate progression or, on favourable paths, enhance suppression consistent with extinction (loss of viability). Finally, one--dimensional simulations illustrate the interplay between anomalous diffusion, fractional noise, and the nonlocal reaction mechanism in shaping the long--time dynamics.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个具有分数阶拉普拉斯算子和分数布朗噪声的随机非局部反应-扩散肿瘤动力学模型，建立了适定性并分析了爆破时间与概率。
AI.motivation: 研究肿瘤动力学中的随机非局部反应-扩散模型，考虑异常扩散（分数阶拉普拉斯算子）和具有时间相关性的分数布朗噪声，旨在理解噪声如何影响肿瘤生长或抑制。
AI.techniques: 使用分数阶拉普拉斯算子建模异常扩散，分数布朗运动（Hurst参数H>1/2）描述时间相关噪声，Doss-Sussmann变换处理线性乘性噪声，概率方法分析爆破行为。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了适定性理论，识别了全局解和有限时间爆破的参数区域；对于线性乘性噪声，给出了爆破时间的上下界估计和爆破概率的定量估计。
AI.significance: 首次将分数布朗噪声与分数阶扩散结合研究肿瘤动力学，揭示了噪声强度如何加速肿瘤进展或增强抑制，为理解肿瘤微环境中的随机波动提供了理论框架。

title: On semilinear Grushin--Schrödinger equation in $\mathbb{R}^N$

AI.tldr: 证明了Grushin型算子方程非平凡非负弱解的存在性，并建立了函数空间嵌入和正则性结果
AI.motivation: 研究Grushin型算子（一种退化椭圆算子）的非线性方程解的存在性，这类算子在几何分析和偏微分方程中有重要应用，特别是在具有奇异性的问题中
AI.techniques: 变分方法、加权Sobolev空间理论、嵌入定理、弱解存在性证明、正则性理论
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了空间E_V^γ到加权Lebesgue空间L_Q^p的嵌入定理；2) 证明了方程非平凡非负弱解的存在性；3) 推导了弱解的正则性结果
AI.significance: 扩展了Grushin型算子非线性问题的理论，为退化椭圆方程的研究提供了新工具，在几何分析和奇异偏微分方程中有重要应用价值

title: Minimizers for boundary reactions: renormalized energy, location of singularities, and applications
summary:
The Casten-Holland and Matano theorem for interior reactions states that no nonconstant stable solutions exist in convex domains $Ω$ of $\mathbb{R}^n$ under zero Neumann boundary conditions. In this paper we establish that the analogous statement fails for boundary reactions when $n=2$ (that is, for harmonic functions in $Ω$ with a Neumann reaction term on its boundary $\partialΩ$). For instance, nonconstant stable solutions exist when $Ω$ is a square, or a smooth strictly convex approximation of it. In regular polygons of many sides, which approach the circle, we can prove the existence of as many nonconstant stable solutions as wished. Instead, in the circle such stable solutions do not exist.
  More importantly, we can predict the existence or not of nonconstant stable solutions, as well as the location of its boundary "vortices" $(p,q)$, through the properties of a real function defined on $\partialΩ\times\partialΩ$ (the renormalized energy) which depends only on the conformal structure of the domain $Ω$. This requires the development of a new Ginzburg-Landau theory for real-valued functions and the analysis of the half-Laplacian on the real line.

AI.tldr: 建立了边界反应问题中非恒定稳定解的存在性理论，揭示了与经典Casten-Holland-Matano定理不同的现象
AI.motivation: 经典Casten-Holland-Matano定理表明在凸区域内部反应问题中不存在非恒定稳定解，但该论文研究边界反应问题是否也有类似结论
AI.techniques: 发展了实值函数的Ginzburg-Landau理论，分析了实线上的半拉普拉斯算子，利用重整化能量函数和共形结构
AI.main_theorems: 证明了边界反应问题在n=2时存在非恒定稳定解（如正方形），而在圆形区域中不存在；建立了通过重整化能量预测稳定解存在性和边界涡旋位置的理论
AI.significance: 揭示了边界反应与内部反应的本质差异，为反应扩散方程的稳定解理论提供了新视角，建立了连接共形几何与PDE稳定性的桥梁

title: Schauder estimates for flat solutions to a class of fully nonlinear elliptic PDEs with Dini continuous data: a geometric tangential approach
summary: In this manuscript, we establish local Schauder estimates for flat viscosity solutions, that is, solutions with sufficiently small norms, to a class of fully nonlinear elliptic partial differential equations of the form \[ F(D^{2} u, x) + \langle \mathfrak{B}(x), D u \rangle = f(x) \quad \text{in} \quad \mathrm{B}_1 \subset \mathbb{R}^{n}, \] where the operator \(F\) is differentiable, though not necessarily convex or concave. In addition, we impose suitable Dini-type continuity assumptions on the data. Our methodology is based on geometric tangential techniques, combined with compactness and perturbative arguments. This approach is strongly motivated by recent advances in the theory of nonlinear elliptic equations and free boundary problems. As a byproduct of our analysis, we also obtain an Evans-Krylov type estimate. Our results can be viewed as an extension of the work by dos Prazeres and Teixeira (Ann. Sc. Norm. Super. Pisa Cl. Sci. (5) 15 (2016), 485-500), now within the framework of linear drift terms and Dini continuity assumptions. Finally, we apply our results to characterize the nodal sets of flat viscosity solutions of non-convex, fully nonlinear, uniformly elliptic PDEs.

AI.tldr: 建立了带有线性漂移项的非凸完全非线性椭圆PDE的平坦粘性解的局部Schauder估计
AI.motivation: 研究带有线性漂移项的非凸完全非线性椭圆PDE的平坦粘性解的局部正则性，扩展dos Prazeres和Teixeira的工作到线性漂移项和Dini连续性假设框架下
AI.techniques: 几何切向方法、紧致性论证、摄动论证，结合Dini型连续性假设
AI.main_theorems: 建立了平坦粘性解的局部Schauder估计，获得了Evans-Krylov型估计，并应用于非凸完全非线性一致椭圆PDE的平坦粘性解的结点集刻画
AI.significance: 扩展了非凸完全非线性椭圆PDE的正则性理论，为研究自由边界问题和结点集提供了新工具，在Dini连续性假设下建立了更精细的正则性结果

title: On a PDE model for Learning in Stochastic Market Entry Games
summary: We study a continuum model for stochastic reinforcement learning in repeated market entry games. Starting from a discrete-time microscopic learning rule, we derive a Fokker--Planck-type equation for the distribution of agents' propensities and, using a kinetic closure, obtain a nonlinear one-particle equation of a mean-field type. For the resulting Cauchy problem, we prove existence and uniqueness of solutions and analyze their long-time behavior. The PDE captures two key phenomena observed in market entry dynamics: aggregate learning (the average number of entrants approaches market capacity) and sorting (propensities concentrate near extreme behaviors). The model also yields explicit characteristic time scales, showing that aggregate learning occurs faster than sorting, in agreement with experimental and computational evidence.

AI.tldr: 建立了市场进入博弈中随机强化学习的连续模型，通过Fokker-Planck方程和平均场方法分析了学习动态的长期行为
AI.motivation: 研究重复市场进入博弈中的随机强化学习过程，从离散时间微观学习规则出发，建立连续模型以分析代理人的学习动态
AI.techniques: 从离散微观规则推导Fokker-Planck型方程，使用动力学闭合方法，得到非线性单粒子平均场方程，分析Cauchy问题的存在唯一性和长期行为
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Cauchy问题解的存在唯一性，分析了长期行为，发现两个关键现象：聚合学习（平均进入者数量趋近市场容量）和分类（倾向性在极端行为附近集中）
AI.significance: 为市场进入博弈中的学习动态提供了连续理论框架，解释了实验和计算观察到的现象，给出了明确的时间尺度，显示聚合学习比分类发生更快

title: Lie symmetry method for a nonlinear heat-diffusion equation
summary:
We investigate the nonlinear heat-diffusion equation \( C(u)\,\frac{\partial u}{\partial t}
  = \frac{\partial}{\partial x}\!\left( K(u)\,\frac{\partial u}{\partial x} \right) \), where \( C(u) \) and \( K(u) \) are coefficients that depend on \( u \). By applying the classical Lie symmetry method, we determine the admitted Lie point symmetries and compute the corresponding infinitesimal generators according to the functional relationship between \( C(u) \) and \( K(u) \). The admitted symmetries are used to reduce the partial differential equation to ordinary differential equations and to construct invariant solutions. Particular cases of physical interest are analyzed in detail, including Storm-type materials and power-law dependence of \( C(u) \) and \( K(u) \) on \( u \). For these cases, similarity solutions are obtained.

AI.tldr: 应用李对称方法分析非线性热扩散方程，确定对称性、约化方程并构造不变解
AI.motivation: 研究非线性热扩散方程 \( C(u)\frac{\partial u}{\partial t} = \frac{\partial}{\partial x}\left( K(u)\frac{\partial u}{\partial x} \right) \)，其中 \( C(u) \) 和 \( K(u) \) 是依赖于 \( u \) 的系数，这类方程在材料科学和热传导中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 经典李对称方法、无穷小生成元计算、对称性约化、相似解构造
AI.main_theorems: 根据 \( C(u) \) 和 \( K(u) \) 的函数关系确定允许的李点对称性，将偏微分方程约化为常微分方程，对Storm型材料和幂律依赖等物理重要情形构造相似解
AI.significance: 为非线性热传导问题提供系统对称性分析框架，所得相似解可用于材料热物性研究，方法可推广到其他非线性扩散问题
